prompt: Complete the three independent string utility modules. `src/slugify.mjs` must export `slugify(value)`, converting trimmed text to lowercase, replacing each run of non-alphanumeric characters with one hyphen, and removing edge hyphens. `src/title-case.mjs` must export `titleCase(value)`, collapsing surrounding and repeated whitespace and capitalizing the first character of each word while lowercasing the remainder. `src/word-count.mjs` must export `wordCount(value)`, returning the number of non-empty whitespace-delimited tokens. Keep each function in its named module; none of these modules needs another utility module.
